itemName.zh: MSA ACH TC-2002 MICH系列头盔
itemName.en: MSA ACH TC-2002 MICH Series helmet (Olive Drab)

description.zh: 所以，夏洛克，想来玩个猜谜游戏吗？在这方面你可是我们的大高手，对吧？看过来。有个瘸腿的流浪汉来到了这附近，天知道他到底是疯了还是傻了才会来这种地方。他衣衫褴褛，从头脏到脚，还臭的要命！简直就是个行走的化学武器。要是把他装进火箭里发射出去，那他所到之处准得寸草不生。哈哈哈，真是他妈的把我眼泪都笑出来了。不好意思我跑题了。当时我只是想把他清理出去，离我们的地盘远点，免得熏到我们，但是我们中的一个人从那一堆粪里认出了他曾经的好友。想象一下！多可怕呀，正常的人居然被这样弄成的屎尿垃圾！但这不是重点。我的人认出了这个衣衫褴褛的家伙，说他不只是个什么普通的鸟玩意儿，而是Polikhim地区两个特别敏感区域的安全部门二把手！试想一下，如果他至少能记住自己的名字，而不是在疯狂地咂嘴时一边嚼着鼻涕一边喃喃自语，他该多有价值啊。真可惜啊！我不知道是什么把他打击成这样的，但是我有点想法。这些时间里这货一直就呆在某个地方，睡在被尿浸透了的床垫上？没错！你应看去看看。需要防化服吗？哈哈，开个玩笑。但是如果真到有需要的时候，防化服就包在我身上，包括别的玩意儿。
description.en: So, Sherlock, you want a riddle? You’re our pro on these headcrackers, right? Here, look. One lame hobo came around here. Either nuts of just demented, hell if I knew. All in rags, dirty head to toe, and the stench! A walking chemical weapon. Launched one on some vector, and where he goes, everything dies off. Hehe. Oh, damn, laughter through tears. But I digress. Just wanted to dispose of him, a bit farther away so the stink wouldn’t reach us, but one of our boys recognized his former homie in that pile of turd. Imagine that! Horrid things are going on, turning people from normal beings to such rubbish, and all for nothing! But that's not the point. The dude that recognized this heap of rags, said that he was not just a regular prick, but a Deputy Head of Security for two special sensitive zones on the Polikhim! Just imagine what kind of source could he become if he could at least remember his name, not just chew snots and mumble while slapping lips like a madman. What a shame! I don't know what got to him, but here's what I think. All this time that bagger lived somewhere, sleeping on some pissed-through mattresses, right? Right! You should look for that place. Need a hazmat suit? Haha, kidding. But if it comes to it, the hazmat’s on me, and not only it.
